description: Version History API, Admin Dashboard, User Management UI, and comprehensive security hardening

changelog.description: API-driven version history from CHANGELOG.md with 3 REST endpoints and caching
Complete admin dashboard with system statistics, quick actions, and activity log
Admin UI for managing users with search, filters, and permission controls
Rate limiting middleware (60/min, 1000/hour) with sliding window algorithm
Security headers middleware (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.) following OWASP best practices
Version history cached for 5 minutes to reduce file I/O
